title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Miss Marple discusses the difficulties of aging and needlework with Dr. Huddlestone. After he jokingly suggests she try "reversing" her work and prescribes her a "stimulating murder mystery," he departs. Shortly after his exit, Miss Knight arrives. Miss Marple observes that while Miss Knight believes murder is unlikely in such a remote location, a murder does eventually occur.

In a separate setting, Lady Bunty prepares to visit Gossington Hall, a house she once knew. She has been invited to tea by the film star Marina Gregg, who sent a handwritten note mentioning a previous meeting in California. As Lady Bunty approaches the estate, she notes the various improvements made to the property and feels nostalgic for the iris beds she once loved.

Upon entering the library, Lady Bunty finds Marina Gregg and her husband, Jason Rad (also known as Goldie), seated at a tea table. Marina expresses a deep desire to settle in the English countryside permanently, viewing the house as her true home. While Jason Rad offers affectionate support to his wife, he privately considers the Victorian house ugly and the location inconvenient, doubting whether Marina will remain enthusiastic about the move for long. Marina greets Lady Bunty warmly, acknowledging the coincidence of their meeting and apologizing for the changes made to the house, which previously belonged to the late Colonel Bantry.
